PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Beth Kramer for Yi Wen Sun. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator had priority. Ms. Kramer stated that the family preferred that the niece administer the estate. The Court will appoint the SFPA as the administrator of the estate. Mr. Ferdon will submit an order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Continued To Aug-27-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
